parts.purpose: Adds a localized description to every thumb when a browser does not expose aria-readonly on its native range accessibility node.
Displays all current values using locale formatting.
Provides the shared measurable pointer and touch surface.
Draws the complete available value domain.
Draws the selected interval between the first and last thumb.

parts.element: div containing one visually hidden input type=range per value
parts.purpose: Provides each ordered value's distinct name, focus, keyboard, pointer, touch, and form semantics.
Displays non-interactive, step-aligned visual tick labels.
